exact_italian: Fondamento dell rote di quessto charro e del loro sito.
literal_english: Foundation of the wheels of this cart and of their position.

exact_italian: Questo movimento è di natura che va inna[n]zi e poi ritorna indirieto, e ancora volta intorno.
literal_english: This movement is of a nature that goes forward and then returns backward, and again turns around.

exact_italian: E cquessto solo achade al rochetto m, che ssi volta nell'anello b. Il quale anello è ssosspinto innanzi e indirieto dalla rota r.
literal_english: And this only happens to the pinion m, which turns in the ring b. Which ring is pushed forward and backward by the wheel r.

exact_italian: E hesso rochetto è inpolato sopra un ferro quadro e llungo, che hentra per la canna quadra n o, come vedi.
literal_english: And this pinion is set on a square and long iron, which enters through the square tube n o, as you see.

exact_italian: Quessto è il modo chome si ferma il polo della rota r.
literal_english: This is the way in which the pole of wheel r is fixed.

exact_italian: E ssimilemente, questi qui di sotto son tutti i pezi qui di sopra.
literal_english: And similarly, these here below are all the parts shown above.

exact_italian: Quessto isstrumento per voltare il manicho f, manda inanzi e ffa tornare indirieto l'asste m n.
literal_english: This instrument, by turning the handle f, sends the shaft m n forward and makes it return backward.

exact_italian: Adoperalo hora tu a' tua propositi, che ffa bene.
literal_english: Use it now for your purposes, it works well.

exact_italian: E lla cinghia che move tale asste hè fferma infra ll'una roccha e ll'altra dirieto, inchiodata sul subbio di dette rocche.
literal_english: And the belt that moves that shaft is fixed between one spindle and the other behind, nailed on the axle of said spindles.

exact_italian: Questo hè il migliore moto che ssia infra i moti doppi, inperoché ssenpre, in ogni sua parte, fia hequale.
literal_english: This is the best motion that exists among double motions, because it will always be equal in every part of it.

exact_italian: E ssapi che lla rota grande che move le due rocche hè apunto meza dentata, chon 12 denti che movano tali roche.
literal_english: And know that the large wheel that moves the two spindles is exactly half-toothed, with 12 teeth that move such spindles.

exact_italian: E anchora ciasscuna d'esse 2 roche sono fatte di 12 fuselli ciascuna per sé.
literal_english: And also each of those 2 spindles is made of 12 rods each by itself.

exact_italian: Ma guarda tu conponitore di sstrumenti, che mai tu non faci tali menbri in lochi ch'elli abino a hessere troppo veloci, perché nel pigliare fuga overo inpito per un verso, e che ssubito essa rota avesi a ritornare indirieto, ella anderebbe a ppericholo di ronpere i sua denti.
literal_english: But you, maker of instruments, take care never to place such members in positions where they must be too fast, because in taking flight or impetus in one direction, and the wheel suddenly having to return backward, it would be in danger of breaking its teeth.

exact_italian: E puossi ancora 'n iscanbio dell'asste che va in qua he in là, fare chon una schaletta di ferro, come qui si dimosstra, e ffia più etterno e men variabile.
literal_english: And one can also, instead of the shaft that goes this way and that, make it with a small iron rack, as is shown here, and it will be more durable and less variable.

exact_italian: Horilogo
literal_english: Clock

exact_italian: Chontrapeso, il quale 'n un braccio di moto disvolgie d'in sul subbio braccia 16 di chorda.
literal_english: Counterweight, which in one arm of motion unwinds from the axle 16 braccia of cord.

exact_italian: Moto traversale, che va he ttorna, chol moto d'una sola rota, che sempre volta per uno solo verso.
literal_english: Transverse motion, that goes and returns, with the motion of a single wheel, that always turns in one direction only.

exact_italian: Modo di sperimentare una misura di pionbo quante misure simile d'acqua voglia per suo equal peso.
literal_english: Method of testing how many similar measures of water a measure of lead requires for its equal weight.

exact_italian: Forma da ffare il boctino, cioè, l'armadura de'fili che llo c[i]rchundano, cioè, fili di ferro. I quali fieno tagliati nel locho m n e ppoi saldati e apichati a uno budello grosso di bo, in figura cholomnale e apichati con vernice, cholla vicinità che a tte parà.
literal_english: Form for making the piston, that is, the armature of the wires that surround it, that is, iron wires. Which shall be cut at the place m n and then soldered and attached to a thick gut of bo, in columnar form and attached with varnish, with the proximity that seems right to you.

exact_italian: Strumento da vedere una libra di pionbo quante volte sé medesimo leva in soma d'acqua.
literal_english: Instrument to see how many times one pound of lead lifts itself in sum of water.

exact_italian: Cioè, diciamo, una misura di pionbo quante misure d'acqua spignie fori del suo livello, levandole in alto.
literal_english: That is, let us say, a measure of lead how many measures of water it drives out of its level, raising them upward.

exact_italian: E prima farai il bottino, el pionbo e lla channa d'equal grosseza, e nota quante volte l'alteza del piobo entra nella alteza dell'acqua che ssi levò sopra il livello dell'acqua del bottino.
literal_english: And first you shall make the piston, the lead and the tube of equal thickness, and note how many times the height of the lead enters into the height of the water that rose above the level of the water of the piston.

exact_italian: Di poi la cana per metà. Di poi la cana per quarto. Di poi la canna e 'l bottino equali e 'l pionbo per metà.
literal_english: Then the tube by half. Then the tube by quarter. Then the tube and the piston equal and the lead by half.

exact_italian: Di poi il [p]ionbo per lo quarto sempre cressciendo per lungeza quello che mancha in grosseza.
literal_english: Then the lead by the quarter, always increasing in length that which it lacks in thickness.

exact_italian: Oltre a di questo, fa in pionbo più largo che 'l bottino e lla chana.
literal_english: Beyond this, make the lead wider than the piston and the tube.

exact_italian: E chosi notando ogni qualità potrai poi giustamente giudicare la potentia d'ogni strumento aquaticho.
literal_english: And thus noting every quality you will then be able justly to judge the power of every hydraulic instrument.

exact_italian: Richordati di sperimentare in questo chaso il peso d'ogni qualità di metallo, pietra e terra e ssilmilemente legnio.
literal_english: Remember to test in this case the weight of every kind of metal, stone and earth and similarly wood.

exact_italian: E 'l simile farai nel bottino con argiento vivo e ogni corpo liquido atto a elevarsi.
literal_english: And the same you shall do in the piston with mercury and every liquid body apt to rise.

exact_italian: Se volli vedere una misura di pionbo quante misure d'acqua voglia per suo chontrappeso, farai in questo modo: fa ttorniare uno pezo di pionbo grosso un'oncia.
literal_english: If you want to see how many measures of water a measure of lead requires for its counterweight, do it in this way: have a piece of lead one ounce thick turned.

exact_italian: equesto ungni con sapone e tuffa 5 o 6 volte 'n un bagnio di ciera, i'modo li faci u[n]a coverta soda e d'eguale alteza al pionbo.
literal_english: And grease this with soap and dip 5 or 6 times in a wax bath, in such a way that you make a solid coat of equal height to the lead.

exact_italian: Di poi trai fora il pionbo e ffa tante misure d'acqua o vino, ch'elle stieno in bilancia chol detto pionbo.
literal_english: Then withdraw the lead and make as many measures of water or wine as shall balance with the said lead.

exact_italian: E cosi farai bona e vera regola sempre sbattendo de'pesi della cera.
literal_english: And thus you shall make a good and true rule, always subtracting the weight of the wax.

exact_italian: Il tirare d'ogni peso sopra le rote debbe essere tirato per la linia del cientro d'eese rote, cioè, che 'l giogo de'boi debbe essere alto quanto el centro della rota, he meglio sarebbe se esso tirare capitassi al cientro del peso che ffano i boi ne'loro cinarsi al tirare del peso.
literal_english: The pull of every weight over the wheels must be pulled along the line of the centre of those wheels, that is, the yoke of the oxen must be as high as the centre of the wheel, and it would be better if the pull reached the centre of weight that the oxen make in inclining themselves to the pull of the weight.

exact_italian: a m son due femmine della vite, de le quali la inferiore hè mobile e ll'altra no.
literal_english: a m are two nuts of the screw, of which the lower is mobile and the other is not.

exact_italian: E ricievano varie potentie dalla vite varia che dentro vi passa.
literal_english: And they receive various powers from the varied screw that passes within.

exact_italian: Qui uno huomo, overo diremo dua homini, i quali adoperino eguale forza ed eguale presteza ne'lor moti.
literal_english: Here one man, or let us say two men, who use equal force and equal speed in their motions.

exact_italian: E lli sstrumenti da tali homini mossi sieno vari.
literal_english: And the instruments moved by such men be various.

exact_italian: Cioè, che ll'uno homo tiri il suo peso cholla vite sanza fine di m, e ll'altro cholla rota n.
literal_english: That is, that one man pulls his weight with the endless screw of m, and the other with the wheel n.
topic: Worm screw vs wheel — equivalence test

exact_italian: E sse dimostra che chiasscuno, adoperando un'ora di tenpo con 25 libre di forza e con egual presteza, e che ciasscuno, in capo dell'ora si truovi chol suo peso all'alteza dove s'a a conducere.
literal_english: And it is shown that each, using one hour of time with 25 pounds of force and with equal speed, and that each, at the end of the hour finds himself with his weight at the height where it is to be brought.
topic: Equal work in equal time — equivalence proof

exact_italian: Cioè, che sse tali omini anno a condurre a una alteza di 100 braccia, 100.000 libre di peso, e che ne tochi 50 mila libre per ciasscuno homo, e che llo strumento di m conduca le sua in una volta, e llo strumento n in 10 volte, che lla decima volta di n si trovi all'alteza delle 100 braccia, insieme con m.
literal_english: That is, that if such men have to bring to a height of 100 braccia 100,000 pounds of weight, and that there falls 50,000 pounds for each man, and that the instrument of m brings its in one turn, and instrument n in 10 turns, that the tenth turn of n finds itself at the height of 100 braccia, together with m.
topic: Conservation law: 1 turn worm = 10 turns wheel for equal work

exact_italian: E ttroverai essere eguali.
literal_english: And you will find them to be equal.

exact_italian: FIGURES ONLY
literal_english: Figures only; no prose in supplied screenshot.

exact_italian: Mo[do] di caricare senprice le cose grave sopra de'charri.
literal_english: Method of loading heavy things simply onto carts.

exact_italian: E ffassi in questa forma apresso de'lonnbardi, come se 'l peso fussi una bonbarda o altra cosa grave, posta al principio del r s, nel locho m.
literal_english: And it is done in this form among the Lombards, as if the weight were a cannon or other heavy thing, placed at the beginning of r s, at place m.

exact_italian: E ssia attachato la chorda alla charena del charro in p, e discienda al peso m e llo circundi in parte, come vedi.
literal_english: And let the cord be attached to the underframe of the cart at p, and descend to the weight m and surround it in part, as you see.
topic: Cord from cart underframe to weight

exact_italian: E di poi si diriai ai giochi de'boi in n, dove tirata quasi all'ultimo del trave r s, alzerai la testa d'esso trave in r.
literal_english: And then direct it to the yoke of the oxen at n, where pulled almost to the last of the beam r s, you will raise the head of that beam at r.

exact_italian: E parte farai tirare co'boi.
literal_english: And in part you will have the oxen pull.

exact_italian: Allora la bonbarda fia condotta al mezo il charro e tal carro si dirizerà avendo il peso in mezzo.
literal_english: Then the cannon will be brought to the middle of the cart and that cart will straighten having the weight in the middle.

exact_italian: Apresso de'giermani si usa charichare i charri in quessta forma, sanza piegare altrementi i carri.
literal_english: Among the Germans it is customary to load carts in this form, without bending the carts in any other way.

exact_italian: Ma il modo lonbardo, avendo più forte rote ne'lor carri, hè assai migliore, perché il peso a minor montata nel piegare del carro che none a llassciare stare il charro in piedi.
literal_english: But the Lombard method, having stronger wheels in their carts, is much better, because the weight has less of a rise in bending the cart than in letting the cart stand upright.
topic: Lombard method: stronger wheels, less rise — better

exact_italian: Movimenti facti chon tardità di tenpo
literal_english: Movements made with slowness of time

exact_italian: Se volterai il manico o p per un solo verso, la sscaletta m n anderà ora in qua he ora in là.
literal_english: If you turn the handle o p in one direction only, the ratchet m n will go now this way and now that way.

exact_italian: E cquessto acade perché il cierchio di mezo alla rota dentata è sollamente dentato la metà, con 6 denti.
literal_english: And this happens because the circle in the middle of the toothed wheel is only toothed half, with 6 teeth.

exact_italian: E lla rocha che da tale meza rota dentata fia voltata, sarà con 6 fuselli.
literal_english: And the spindle that will be turned by that half-toothed wheel, will have 6 rods.

exact_italian: Ma sappi che tale rocha sta meglio più corta e non dimezata.
literal_english: But know that such a spindle is better shorter and not halved.

exact_italian: Quessto fa il medesimo ofitio che quello di sopra.
literal_english: This does the same office as the one above.

exact_italian: Conciosiaché la channa o p si mova in qua he in là, su la lungeza del masscio f t, come fa per sé la sschaletta di sopra m n.
literal_english: Since the tube o p moves this way and that, along the length of the solid f t, as the ratchet m n above does by itself.

exact_italian: Questi due moti di sopra sono hequali per potentia chome per movimento.
literal_english: These two motions above are equal in power as in movement.
topic: Two mechanisms equal in power and motion

exact_italian: Guarda quanto questa potentia si va variando nel fare il suo moto.
literal_english: Observe how much this power goes varying in making its motion.

exact_italian: Vedi la lieva s a, che ss'è acressciuta da s b, come si mostra quand'è giunta a la linia s n.
literal_english: See the lever s a, which has grown from s b, as is shown when it arrives at the line s n.
topic: Lever growth from s b to s n

exact_italian: Questo moto sarà hequale nel movimento ma fortemente disequale nella potentia del suo motore.
literal_english: This motion will be equal in movement but strongly unequal in the power of its mover.

exact_italian: Questo modo è ssimile a cquello delle lieve che qui hè a risscontro in pari numero di asste.
literal_english: This mode is similar to that of the levers which here corresponds in equal number of shafts.

exact_italian: E non ci fo altro divario sennonché quessto, per essere fatto chon rote dentate cholle sue rochette, esso a chontinuatione nel suo moto, della qual cosa lo sstrumento delle lieve senpli è privato.
literal_english: And there is no other difference but this, that being made with toothed wheels with their pinions, it has continuity in its motion, of which thing the simple lever instrument is deprived.

exact_italian: Se ttu multiplichi qui il numero delle rotelle over girelle per lo numero delle libre che pesa il chontrappeso f, tu troverai il peso m n, il quale starà in equilibra chol peso f e ffia 33 libre.
literal_english: If you multiply here the number of small wheels or pulleys by the number of pounds that the counterweight f weighs, you will find the weight m n, which will be in equilibrium with the weight f and will be 33 pounds.

exact_italian: E infra tirari conpossti questo hè il più debole e di mancho valitudine e ssolo si pò laldare per essere assai sichuro, perché non è sottopossto a denti di rote, chome gli altri, benché lo sstrumento qui di sopra, anchora lui si possa fare con chorde he ffia anchora lui sichuro.
literal_english: And among composite pulls this is the weakest and of least force and can only be praised for being very safe, because it is not subject to teeth of wheels, as the others are, although the instrument above can also be made with cords and will also be safe.

exact_italian: Qui si dimanda per quale linia il moto di quessta antenna fia più facile al suo motore ho per la linia equidiacente f m, hopur per la linia obbliqua n m, ho voi in qualunque grado infra l'un e ll'altra linia.
literal_english: Here is asked by which line the motion of this antenna will be easier for its mover, whether by the equidistant line f m, or by the oblique line n m, or you wish in any degree between one and the other line.
topic: Equidistant vs oblique pull — problem posed

exact_italian: Chiaro si dimosstra per la 60ª del 7°, che lla chorda equidiacente sente men faticha del peso da llei mosso che per qualunque linia hesso peso fussi tirato.
literal_english: It is clearly shown by the 60th of the 7th, that the equidistant cord feels less effort of the weight moved by it than by any line along which that weight were pulled.
topic: Citation: 60th of the 7th — equidistant cord least effort

exact_italian: Inperoché la chorda equidiacente f m solamente hè affatichata dalla chonfregatione che ffa hesso peso cholla terra donde si move.
literal_english: Because the equidistant cord f m is only fatigued by the friction that that weight makes with the ground from which it moves.

exact_italian: E cquanto esso moto la detta chonfregatione s'allegierisscie in n, tanto cresscie in m, in modo che ssenpre hè d'equal faticha alla corda f m, né mai cresscie o diminuisscie, i'nessun grado di moto la faticha d'essa confrichatione.
literal_english: And as much as that motion the said friction lightens in n, so much grows in m, in such a way that it is always of equal effort to the cord f m, nor does the effort of that friction ever grow or diminish in any degree of motion.

exact_italian: La qual chonfregatione è molto minore che non è il peso del trave, chome nel 5° del 9° dimostrai.
literal_english: Which friction is much less than the weight of the beam, as I showed in the 5th of the 9th.

exact_italian: Ora ci resta a dire che diferentia harebe di faticha il motore d'essa antenna, se hesso la tirassi per la linia obbliqua n m.
literal_english: Now it remains to say what difference of effort the mover of this antenna would have, if he pulled it along the oblique line n m.

exact_italian: Ogni grado di moto della linia obbliqua muta gradi di peso.
literal_english: Every degree of motion of the oblique line changes degrees of weight.
topic: Oblique motion: weight varies per degree

exact_italian: E per la linia equidiacente ogni grado di moto osserva il medesimo peso, tolto insieme se[n]pre i pesi fatti, over mutati in n m e giunti insieme, perché quanto s'alegierisscie in n, tanto cresscie in m.
literal_english: And along the equidistant line every degree of motion observes the same weight, always taking together the weights made or changed in n m and joined together, because as much as is lightened in n, so much grows in m.
topic: Equidistant line: weight constant every degree

exact_italian: Le rote del tenpo sono 3, cioè, 2 dentate e lla 3ª move il tenpo.
literal_english: The wheels of the regulator are 3, that is, 2 toothed and the 3rd moves the regulator.

exact_italian: Delle quali la prima rota ha 64 denti e move una rocha di 8 denti.
literal_english: Of which the first wheel has 64 teeth and moves a pinion of 8 teeth.

exact_italian: La 2ª rota ha 48 denti e move una rochetta di 6 denti.
literal_english: The 2nd wheel has 48 teeth and moves a pinion of 6 teeth.

exact_italian: La 3ª rota è quella che move il tenpo, ha 21 denti.
literal_english: The 3rd wheel is the one that moves the regulator, has 21 teeth.

exact_italian: E lla rota di fori che mosstra l'ore ha in sé 96 denti e lla rocca che lla move ha 4 denti.
literal_english: And the outer wheel that shows the hours has in itself 96 teeth and the pinion that moves it has 4 teeth.

exact_italian: r hè la rota del primo moto. He nel suo voltare hessa, chol suo dente e, move la lieva falcata x in là, onde la lieva & si viene ad alzare, e alza lo strumento delle 3 chiavi b c a.
literal_english: r is the wheel of the first motion. And in its turning, with its tooth e, it moves the sickle-shaped lever x outward, whereby the lever & comes to rise, and raises the instrument of the 3 keys b c a.
topic: First-motion wheel drives sickle-lever and 3-key instrument

exact_italian: He ssimilmente halza il sosstentachulo l, il quale hè l'ultima chiave.
literal_english: And similarly it raises the support l, which is the last key.

exact_italian: Inperoché, quando l si alza, il dente b dissciende e ss'apogia e fferma sopra sé insino a ttanto che 'l dente del primo moto è passato di là dalla lieva x.
literal_english: Because, when l rises, tooth b descends and rests and fixes itself until the tooth of the first motion has passed beyond lever x.

exact_italian: Ma inanzi ch'esso dente e sia passato la lieva x, già le 3 chiavi a b c sono sciavate e posate in su'labri delle lor crenne.
literal_english: But before that tooth e has passed lever x, already the 3 keys a b c are released and placed on the lips of their notches.

exact_italian: E già sschorrerebbon le rote al lor chamino se non fussi la chiave q l, la qual fa asspettare tanto che lla lieva x sia passato il dente del primo moto e.
literal_english: And already the wheels would run their course if it were not for the key q l, which makes them wait until lever x has passed the tooth of the first motion e.
topic: Key q l arrests wheel run

exact_italian: He ssapi che lla rota del contrapeso ha 48 denti, e ssi chongiugnie cholla sua rocchetta di 8 denti con che hessa leva il martello de l'ore.
literal_english: And know that the counterweight wheel has 48 teeth, and joins with its pinion of 8 teeth with which it raises the hammer of the hours.
topic: Counterweight wheel 48 teeth, pinion 8, raises hour hammer

exact_italian: La 2ª rota ha pure 48 denti, he a nella sua sciena apichato la rotella p, la quale chon una sola crenna ricieva la chiave a, e move sopra di sé una rochetta di 8 denti.
literal_english: The 2nd wheel also has 48 teeth, and has attached to its back the small wheel p, which with a single notch receives key a, and moves above itself a pinion of 8 teeth.
topic: Wheel 2 detail: 48 teeth, notch-wheel p, pinion 8

exact_italian: La 3ª rota ha 36 denti e nel suo stile il dente q, ch'è l'ultima chiave.
literal_english: The 3rd wheel has 36 teeth and in its shaft the tooth q, which is the last key.
topic: Wheel 3: 36 teeth, tooth q = last key

exact_italian: E ssopra di sé ha la rochetta di 6 denti.
literal_english: And above itself has the pinion of 6 teeth.

exact_italian: La quarta rota ha 24 denti e move una rochetta di sei denti 'n iscanbio di ventola.
literal_english: The fourth wheel has 24 teeth and moves a pinion of six teeth instead of a vane.

exact_italian: E lla rota delle chiavi ha 125 denti.
literal_english: And the wheel of the keys has 125 teeth.

exact_italian: Questa si chiava chon 2 chiavi, cioè, una presso al cientro, l'altra in istremo.
literal_english: This is keyed with 2 keys, that is, one near the centre, the other at the extreme.

exact_italian: Lieva la quale sona l'ore levando il martello.
literal_english: Lever which sounds the hours by raising the hammer.

exact_italian: La rochetta, che move la rota dove si chiava il fine dell'ore chon 125 denti, ha in sé 5 denti.
literal_english: The pinion, which moves the wheel where the end of the hours is keyed with 125 teeth, has in itself 5 teeth.

exact_italian: Vedi qui anchora come la rota di sopra è divisa in due parti equali, delle quali parti l'una hè dentata e ll'altra no.
literal_english: See here also how the wheel above is divided into two equal parts, of which parts one is toothed and the other is not.

exact_italian: E ciasscuna di loro viene ha essere dispari.
literal_english: And each of them comes to be odd.

exact_italian: Hora tu puoi far dare alla rochetta che parte tu vuoi di volta.
literal_english: Now you can make the pinion turn by whatever part you wish.

exact_italian: Come dire i'voglio ch'ella dia volta intera, farai 8 fusi alla rocha e 8 denti per posta alla rota.
literal_english: As to say I want it to give a full turn, you will make 8 rods on the pinion and 8 teeth per section on the wheel.
topic: Full turn: 8 rods, 8 teeth per section

exact_italian: E sse ttu voi ch'ella dia 1/4 di volta, fa la rocha pur di 8 fusi e 2 denti per posta.
literal_english: And if you want it to give 1/4 turn, make the pinion also of 8 rods and 2 teeth per section.
topic: Quarter turn: 8 rods, 2 teeth per section

exact_italian: Sappi che in questa rota tutte le parte dentate debbono essere dispari, cioè, tutte le poste, le quali qui sono 5.
literal_english: Know that in this wheel all the toothed parts must be odd, that is, all the sections, which here are 5.

exact_italian: E sse ffussino 6 starebon male.
literal_english: And if they were 6 it would be wrong.

exact_italian: Siché fane una, ho 3 ho 5 ho 7, e chosi infinitamente sieno dispari, a uso della rota che move il tenpo all'oriolo.
literal_english: So make one, or 3 or 5 or 7, and so on infinitely be odd, for use of the wheel that moves the regulator of the clock.

exact_italian: E attendi che il dente di sopra lasscia il fusello in o, che ssubito di sotto si ripigli l'altro fusello in t.
literal_english: And attend that the upper tooth releases the rod at o, so that immediately below it takes up the other rod at t.

exact_italian: Questa va molto hequale e ssalda, i'modo fa gran chamino, perché la rocha ch'ella conduce dà volta intera, 8 fusi a lla rocha he 8 denti ha la meza rota.
literal_english: This goes very uniform and steady, in such a way it makes a great journey, because the pinion it drives gives a full turn, 8 rods to the pinion and 8 teeth to the half wheel.
topic: Uniform motion: full turn per engagement

exact_italian: Quello ufitio che ffa l'asste per lo buso n, cioè, dello entrare he usscire sechondo che 'l voltare della rota m la conduce, il medesimo si pò fare in m, cioè, dall'opposita parte.
literal_english: That office which the shaft does through the hole n, that is, of entering and exiting according to how the turning of wheel m conducts it, the same can be done in m, that is, from the opposite side.
topic: Shaft entry-exit reversible from either side

exact_italian: Domando perché qui in pari contatto e fforza e ttenp[o] e moto e peso, perché si sega più opera nell'una che nell'altra.
literal_english: I ask why here with equal contact and force and time and motion and weight, why more work is sawn in one than in the other.

exact_italian: Io ho una sega la quale profunda un braccio per ora dentro a una pietra, colla quale essa a 1 braccio di contatto, e lla sega pesa 10 libre.
literal_english: I have a saw which penetrates one braccio per hour into a stone, with which it has 1 braccio of contact, and the saw weighs 10 pounds.
topic: Saw baseline: 1 braccio/hr, 10 lb, 1 braccio contact

exact_italian: Ora io radoppio il contatto d'essa sega, e folio 2 braccia.
literal_english: Now I double the contact of that saw, and it becomes 2 braccia.

exact_italian: Dico che ti bisognia radopiare il peso della sega e profonderassi medesimamente 1 braccio per ora, faciendo pari moto in [...]
literal_english: I say that you need to double the weight of the saw and it will penetrate equally 1 braccio per hour, making equal motion in [...].
topic: Double weight required for same penetration rate

exact_italian: La parte alluminata de'chorpi di pari grandeza fia più luminosa, del quale l'onbra dirivativa sarà più brieve.
literal_english: The illuminated part of bodies of equal size will be more luminous, of which the derived shadow will be shorter.
topic: Shorter derived shadow = more luminous body

exact_italian: Le parti alluminate de'corpi di pari grandeze aranno tal proportioni nelle lor chiareze, quale anno infra lloro le lungeze de l'onbrose piramide.
literal_english: The illuminated parts of bodies of equal sizes will have such proportions in their brightness as they have between them the lengths of the shadow pyramids.

exact_italian: Il corpo f sarà la metà meno alluminato che il corpo e, perché la sua parte del cielo che ll'alumina è dupla minor che quella de e, come si dimostra in c d he a b.
literal_english: Body f will be half as illuminated as body e, because the part of the sky that illuminates it is doubly smaller than that of e, as is shown in c d and a b.
topic: Half illumination from half sky angle

exact_italian: Quella proportione che a l'angolo che ssi rinchiude infra 'l corpo alluminato e ll'asis del razo alluminante l'uno coll'altro, talle arà le qualità de'lumi.
literal_english: That proportion which the angle that is enclosed between the illuminated body and the axis of the illuminating ray has, one to the other, such will be the qualities of the lights.
topic: Angle between body and light-axis determines light quality

exact_italian: Se l'angolo acuto r c d entra 4 volte in nell'angolo c m n, c r fia 4 volte men luminoso che c n.
literal_english: If the acute angle r c d enters 4 times into the angle c m n, c r will be 4 times less luminous than c n.
topic: Acute angle 4× in obtuse → 4× less luminous

exact_italian: Anchora se s'angolo c m n entra 12 volte i'nell'angolo ottuso a r d e ll'angolo c m n entra 3 in nello ottuso m n o, sequirà la proportione.
literal_english: Also if the angle c m n enters 12 times into the obtuse angle a r d and the angle c m n enters 3 in the obtuse m n o, the proportion will follow.

exact_italian: Moto di diseguale forza perché il cientro della rota che move non è nel suo mezzo
literal_english: Motion of unequal force because the centre of the wheel that moves is not in its middle
topic: Section heading: off-centre wheel — unequal force

exact_italian: Anchora la potentia di questo motore hè disequale, sol per non avere il suo circulo che move equalmente distante al cientro della rota principale.
literal_english: Also the power of this mover is unequal, solely for not having its circle that moves equally distant from the centre of the main wheel.

exact_italian: Questo moto di sotto, bench'esso sia eguale in forza, esso non fia eguale in movimento.
literal_english: This motion below, although it be equal in force, it will not be equal in movement.

exact_italian: Questo moto hè assai laldabile, sì per la facilità del moto, chome per la brevità dell'opera.
literal_english: This motion is very praiseworthy, both for the ease of the motion and for the brevity of the work.

exact_italian: Se ll'acqua si troverà a ccierta alteza nella sua canna premuta dal peso, e cquel peso dissciendia [per] perpendiculare linia e ll'acqua similemente monti [per] perpendichular linia, torci poi tal strumento in qualunque linia ti piace, che ssenpre tale acqua starà alla medesima alteza nella sua channa.
literal_english: If the water will be found at a certain height in its tube pressed by the weight, and that weight descends along a perpendicular line and the water similarly rises along a perpendicular line, twist then that instrument in whatever line you please, and that water will always stand at the same height in its tube.
topic: Water maintains height regardless of tube orientation

exact_italian: E questo achade che sse 'l pionbo mancha del suo peso per fare obbliquo disscienso, l'acqua fa il simile nel levarsi per simile obbliquità.
literal_english: And this happens because if the lead loses of its weight by making oblique descent, the water does the same in rising by similar obliquity.
topic: Lead and water — equal obliquity effect

exact_italian: Questo hè mo[to] che sspingie he ttira.
literal_english: This is motion that pushes and pulls.

exact_italian: Spingie, quando la parte dell'esse h f n a mandato l'angolo d nello stremo della rota in h, allora la stangetta m d si truova sosspinta in fuori.
literal_english: It pushes, when the part of the shaft h f n has sent angle d to the extreme of the wheel in h, then the small rod m d finds itself pushed outward.
topic: Push phase: angle d at extreme h

exact_italian: E chosi tira, quando l'angolo d si truova sul cientro della rota in f.
literal_english: And thus it pulls, when angle d finds itself on the centre of the wheel in f.
topic: Pull phase: angle d at centre f

exact_italian: Il quale moto achade [quando] la parte dell'esse f n sosspingie il piè della sstanga s f inverso d, onde essendo i poli s o fermi quando f va inverso d, d viene inverso il cientro della rota, perché o hè polo.
literal_english: Which motion happens when the part of the shaft f n pushes the foot of the rod s f toward d, whereby being the poles s o fixed when f goes toward d, d comes toward the centre of the wheel, because o is the pole.

exact_italian: Ma ssappi che ll'esse h f n vole hessere mezo di qua dalla rota e mmezzo di là, a volere stare vene.
literal_english: But know that the shaft h f n must be half this side of the wheel and half that side, in order to work well.
topic: Shaft must be centred across wheel

exact_italian: In questa forma debbe stare l'esse della rota di sopra, cioè, h f n, che verrà a essere 1/2 di qua e 1/2 di là.
literal_english: In this form the shaft of the upper wheel must stand, that is, h f n, which will come to be 1/2 on this side and 1/2 on that.

exact_italian: Tal proportione ano i lumi che ssi rinchiudano infra ll'asis del razo luminoso e 'l piano da cquello alluminato, quale infra lloro anno le base dele conposte piramide.
literal_english: Such proportion do the lights have that are enclosed between the axis of the luminous ray and the plane illuminated by it, as between them the bases of the compound pyramids have.
topic: Light proportion = base ratio of compound pyramids

exact_italian: Fass[i] l'aste movere sopra una delle sue stremità in diversi modi, de'quali fia solamente inanzi e in dirieto, cioè, che lla parte che ssi move torni per la propia via ch'ella andò inanzi.
literal_english: The shaft is made to move on one of its extremities in various ways, of which shall be only forward and backward, that is, that the part that moves returns by the same way that it went forward.

exact_italian: De'quali modi b c d e sono d'eguale natura, salvo che si biasima a, perché a una canna che veste il polo, nella quale si giugnie insieme col suo unto molta polvere e consumation del ferro.
literal_english: Of which modes b c d e are of equal nature, except that a is blamed, because it has a tube that clothes the pole, in which joins together with its grease much dust and consumption of the iron.
topic: Mode a: dust and iron wear — condemned

exact_italian: E viene a ffare una cosa visciosa che inpedisscie il moto.
literal_english: And it comes to make a viscous thing that impedes the motion.

exact_italian: a fia la più trista, perché a più moti e non pò osservare l'andare e 'l tornare per una sola linia.
literal_english: a will be the worst, because it has more motions and cannot observe going and returning along a single line.

exact_italian: Ecci altri moti de'poli, i quali vanno in circulo colla sua asste, dalla parte di sopra o di sotto, e ll'oposita stremità dell'aste sta ferma 'n un punto e non volta in sé medesima.
literal_english: There are other motions of the poles, which go in a circle with their shaft, from the upper or lower part, and the opposite extremity of the shaft stays fixed at a point and does not turn in itself.
topic: Pole circular motion — opposite end fixed

exact_italian: Altre cie n'è, che nel detto hofitio, voltano in sé medesimo.
literal_english: There are others, which in the said office, turn in themselves.

exact_italian: Altre, sanza fare moto circulare dall'una o dall'altra stremità, solo attendano a voltare in sé medesima insù la sua fronte, come il polo delle pietre de'molini.
literal_english: Others, without making circular motion from one or the other extremity, only attend to turning in themselves on their front face, like the pole of millstones.

exact_italian: Altre, fermato la testa di sopra o di sotto, si movano solamente in qua e i[n] llà, posandosi sopra le loro fronti.
literal_english: Others, with the upper or lower head fixed, move only this way and that, resting on their front faces.

exact_italian: Altre nel medesimo hofitio si voltano in sé medesime.
literal_english: Others in the same office turn in themselves.

exact_italian: Questa hè una ventola che piglia l'aria.
literal_english: This is a vane that takes the air.

exact_italian: E ssi dimanda quale fa più resistenzia i'nel suo voltare coll'aria che lla perchote, ho la ventola di 2 braccia, o di 4 o di 8.
literal_english: And is asked which makes more resistance in its turning with the air that strikes it, whether the vane of 2 braccia, or of 4 or of 8.

exact_italian: Dimando quale ventola si moverà più veloce o ttarda, quella che a molti rami o che nn'a pochi, quella che a i rami più lunghi o più chorti, quella che gli a più larghi o ssottili, quella che gli a più legeri o più grievi.
literal_english: I ask which vane will move faster or slower, that which has many branches or that which has few, that which has longer or shorter branches, that which has them wider or thinner, that which has them lighter or heavier.
topic: Vane speed variables: count, length, width, weight

exact_italian: E di tutte si dimanda le diferentie.
literal_english: And of all these are asked the differences.

exact_italian: E quella che a i rami di varie lungeze e pari peso infra lloro, e cquella che gli a traforati a modo di crivello, o tessuti come staccio, o frapati [c]ome pettine o di cartilagine o panicoli pilosi o puliti o lenti o tirati.
literal_english: And that which has branches of various lengths and equal weight among them, and that which has them perforated like a sieve, or woven like a screen, or fringed like a comb or of cartilage or hairy membranes smooth or slow or stretched.
topic: Vane variants: perforated, woven, fringed, membrane
